title: a11y kill JSON5 grap support
desc: a11y kill accepts JSON5 grap {proc:'x',pid:N,cmd:'...'} with AND-logic, reusing WindowFinder.TryParseMultiFieldPattern
steps: Fields recognized for kill: proc (glob/regex), pid (numeric), cmd (cmdline glob/regex). title/cls/domain/url are window-only and ignored with warning
A11yKillByMultiField helper applies same guards as legacy path: self-kill, ancestor, mcp-launcher, eye-child, webbot-cdp, --nth, --dry-run
Legacy name pattern still works unchanged when grap is not brace-wrapped
author: claude
